sn2.2:1.2: Standing to one side, Kassapa the deva’s son recited this verse in the Blessed One’s presence:
sn2.2:2.1: “A monk should have jhāna, be released in mind,
sn2.2:2.2: if he wants the heart’s attainment:
sn2.2:2.3: knowing the arising & passing away of the world,
sn2.2:2.4: good in his awareness, independent, aimed at that reward.”
